posts.cookedHtml:
Trying to query items by name (exacly like the one listed in the example with the correct board id and without the country column), results in a 404 Column not found (store.monday.automation.error.missing_column)

Items page by column values (monday.com)

I have the API-Version header and a valid authorization, so not sure as of what I might be doing wrong. Any help would be appreciated!

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
